description_long: This chest of drawers is constructed from weathered, grayish-brown wood, giving it a rustic and aged appearance. The front features two large drawers, each fitted with two round, recessed metal handles in a dark finish. The wood grain is prominent and uneven, with visible cracks and knots that add to its distressed character. The sides and back are plain, with the same textured wood surface and minimal hardware, except for small black metal corner brackets for reinforcement. The base is slightly raised on small, dark feet, providing a subtle lift from the ground. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative embellishments beyond the natural wood texture.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden chest of drawers with two large drawers and round recessed metal handles, featuring a distressed wood grain and minimal hardware.
description_view_0: The left side of the chest shows a plain, weathered wood surface with visible grain and two black metal corner brackets.
description_view_1: The front view displays two large drawers with four round recessed metal handles and a prominent wood grain pattern.
description_view_2: The right side mirrors the left, showing a plain wood surface with two black metal corner brackets.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a continuous wood panel with a symmetrical grain pattern and no visible hardware or openings.
